creator: Mark.Martinec@ijs.si
text:
Created attachment 177668
Poudriere build log of textproc/p5-Search-Elasticsearch

Using Search-Elasticsearch-5.01, FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p2 amd64.

The 'make package' phase of building a port fails. Seems like
it is looking for a wrong set of files, which do not exist.
The same happens either building under poudriere, or interactively
in the ports directory with a 'make package' command:

[...]
Installing /wrkdirs/usr/ports/textproc/p5-Search-Elasticsearch/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3
/Search::Elasticsearch::Role::Logger.3
Installing /wrkdirs/usr/ports/textproc/p5-Search-Elasticsearch/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3
/Search::Elasticsearch::Role::Is_Sync.3
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for p5-Search-Elasticsearch-5.01
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/textproc/p5-Search-Elasticsearch/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3/Search::Elasticsearch::Bulk.3.gz: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/textproc/p5-Search-Elasticsearch/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3/Search::Elasticsearch::Client::0_90::Direct.3.gz: No such file or directory
[...]
